{{Infobox group
| name = Pawns
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Pawns are grotesque, humanoid combatants utilized by the [[Iron Legion]]. Composed of a disturbing fusion of biological flesh and mechanical components, they are often described as unholy abominations. Their physical forms are highly distorted, sometimes appearing as four-limbed, spider-like creatures with a bald head that emerges from a metallic casing. Because of their twisted appearance, encountering them can cause intense, paralyzing revulsion in those unaccustomed to seeing them, requiring specialized military training to manage the psychological shock. In combat settings like an [[Iron Hive]], they are frequently deployed in large numbers and can attack from various directions. They serve as a standard unit within the [[Legion]]'s ranks, often making up the bulk of crews on boarding devices alongside other specialized entities like [[Sentries]] and [[Shepherds]]. They are capable of attacking with small projectiles of purple light and are frequently used in ambush tactics.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Pawns are unholy abominations composed of leftover machinery and corpses that resemble four-limbed [[spiders]]. Serving as a standard part of an [[Iron Legion]] Penetrator's crew, these entities function as an army capable of drowning targets in a mass of flesh. They are utilized to capture individuals for conversion into [[Shepherds]], and they were observed swarming the barrier of the [[Hive]] before evaporating upon approaching [[Sola]]. Ultimately, any crew members who fail their mission face being transformed into Pawns themselves.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns]] are an army that can be used to drown targets in flesh.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns]] are part of the standard crew complement for an [[Iron Legion]] Penetrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns]] are unholy abominations of metal and flesh that resemble four-limbed [[spiders]] made from corpses and leftover machinery.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns]] can be used to capture individuals and turn them into [[Shepherds]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns]] swarm around the barrier of the [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns]] evaporate when they get near [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|If the mission fails, the crew members will be made into [[Pawns]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
